title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 11 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 11/01/2022
Image reference: 2022-01-11_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-11-2022_img1.png
Tanker: Suezmax values have firmed. VLCC New Talisman (296,100 DWT, Sep 2009, Bohai Shipbuilding Heavy Industry Co) sold to Aeolos Management for USD 36.00 mil, VV value USD 34.67 mil. Small Clean Tankers Northsea Alpha and North Sea Beta (8,600 DWT, May 2010, Kejin Shipyard) sold in an en bloc deal to Far Eastern buyers for USD 8.90 mil, VV value USD 10.92 mil.
